# Seed Entry Contribution

## What this PR adds

<!-- Briefly describe the entry or entries you're adding -->

## Entry type

- [ ] `owner` — a GitHub account
- [ ] `repo` — a specific repository (`owner/repo`)
- [ ] `contributor` — a contributor appearing across multiple suspect repos

## Evidence

**Source:**
<!-- Link to the source (Wall-of-Shames, StarScout dataset, blog post, security report...) -->

**Why this verdict:**
<!-- Explain what makes this entry suspicious or a confirmed scam.
     "It scored high on legitifier" is not sufficient evidence. -->

**Reproducible proof:**
<!-- Code snippet, screenshot, commit hash, or other verifiable evidence -->

## Confidence level

- [ ] `unsure` — pattern matches but not confirmed
- [ ] `probable` — strong signals, manual review
- [ ] `certain` — confirmed by an external published source (required for this level)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [data/seed_schema.md](../data/seed_schema.md)
- [ ] My entry follows the append-only rule (no existing lines modified)
- [ ] `note` field contains reproducible evidence
- [ ] `added` date is today
- [ ] I am not submitting a competitor, critic, or anyone I have a conflict of interest with
- [ ] For `confidence: certain` — I have linked an external published source
